title: Seamless Wallet Single Piece

imagePrompts.prompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A brushed aluminum wallet — no visible stitching, clasp, or opening, folds perfectly from a single piece

PHASE 2 — SURFACE: satin finish exterior, AURORA grain, deep teal tone

PHASE 3 — SCENE: Place it in sunlit modern studio surrounded by linen notebook and ceramic cup

PHASE 4 — LIGHT: soft golden side light from front-facing hero composition, tomato red palette throughout

Swap: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red

originalPrompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A brushed aluminum wallet — no visible stitching, clasp, or opening, folds perfectly from a single piece

PHASE 2 — SURFACE: satin finish exterior, AURORA grain, deep teal tone

PHASE 3 — SCENE: Place it in sunlit modern studio surrounded by linen notebook and ceramic cup

PHASE 4 — LIGHT: soft golden side light from front-facing hero composition, tomato red palette throughout

Swap: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red

promptTranslations.zh:
第一阶段 — 形态：一个brushed aluminum钱包——无可见缝线、扣环或开口，由单片材料完美折叠而成

第二阶段 — 表面：satin finish外观，AURORA纹理，deep teal色调

第三阶段 — 场景：将其置于sunlit modern studio中，周围环绕linen notebook and ceramic cup

第四阶段 — 光影：来自front-facing hero composition的soft golden side light光，整体采用tomato red色调

替换项：brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
promptTranslations.fr:
PHASE 1 — FORME : Un portefeuille brushed aluminum — sans couture visible, fermoir ou ouverture, pliant parfaitement d’une seule pièce

PHASE 2 — SURFACE : extérieur satin finish, grain AURORA, ton deep teal

PHASE 3 — SCÈNE : place-le dans sunlit modern studio entouré de linen notebook and ceramic cup

PHASE 4 — LUMIÈRE : soft golden side light venant de front-facing hero composition, palette tomato red générale

Échange : brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
promptTranslations.ru:
ЭТАП 1 — ФОРМА: Кошелек из brushed aluminum — без видимых швов, застежек или отверстий, идеально сложен из цельного куска материала

ЭТАП 2 — ПОВЕРХНОСТЬ: Внешняя отделка satin finish, зернистая текстура AURORA, цветовой тон deep teal

ЭТАП 3 — СЦЕНА: Разместите его в sunlit modern studio в окружении linen notebook and ceramic cup

ЭТАП 4 — СВЕТ: soft golden side light с front-facing hero composition, общая цветовая палитра tomato red

Переменные: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
promptTranslations.pt:
FASE 1 — FORMA: Uma carteira brushed aluminum — sem costura visível, fecho ou abertura, dobra-se perfeitamente a partir de uma única peça

FASE 2 — SUPERFÍCIE: exterior satin finish, textura AURORA, tom deep teal

FASE 3 — CENA: Coloque-a em sunlit modern studio rodeada por linen notebook and ceramic cup

FASE 4 — LUZ: soft golden side light de front-facing hero composition, paleta tomato red em toda a cena

Permuta: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
promptTranslations.ja:
フェーズ1 — 形状: brushed aluminum製のウォレット。縫い目や留め具、開口部が見えない、一枚の革から完璧に折りたたまれたデザイン。

フェーズ2 — 表面: satin finish仕上げの外装、AURORAのグレイン（シボ感）、deep tealの色調。

フェーズ3 — シーン: sunlit modern studioに配置し、linen notebook and ceramic cupを周囲に散りばめる。

フェーズ4 — ライティング: front-facing hero compositionからのsoft golden side light、全体的にtomato redのカラーパレットで統一。

入れ替え項目: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
promptTranslations.ko:
PHASE 1 — 형태: brushed aluminum 지갑 — 스티치, 잠금장치, 개구부가 보이지 않으며 한 조각에서 완벽하게 접히는 구조

PHASE 2 — 표면: satin finish 외관, AURORA 결, deep teal 톤

PHASE 3 — 장면: sunlit modern studio에 배치하고 주변에 linen notebook and ceramic cup를 배치

PHASE 4 — 조명: front-facing hero composition에서 비추는 soft golden side light, 전체적으로 tomato red 팔레트 적용

교체 항목: brushed aluminum / sunlit modern studio / linen notebook and ceramic cup / tomato red
